device: Pixel 6a (bluejay), serial 27051JEGR10034, USB, physical device in a real (uncontrolled) room
captureClock: agent-side aec-capture (production LiveDiarizationSession buffers), 16 kHz mono
notes: warmup seconds (no playback) sit at the 0.021 room floor; playback seconds jump to 0.074 (11/25) / 0.22 (25/25) — the echo dominates the mic by ~11 dB / ~20 dB, i.e. a real acoustic loop, unlike the emulator's synthetic mic
near RMS at full volume (0.22, peak 0.955) shows loudspeaker nonlinearity territory; the canonical capture uses 11/25 (~44 %), comparable to the accepted macOS run's 45 % output volume

identical near RMS across the two early runs exposed that `cmd media_session volume --set` silently does not apply on this device — volume is driven via KEYCODE_VOLUME_UP/DOWN with read-verify in the committed driver
